abort.already_configured: VK Cloud Vision is already configured

init.title: VK Cloud Vision Settings
init.description: Manage face recognition and data cleanup.

face_recognition.title: Face Recognition
face_recognition.description:
Enable training mode to automatically enroll unrecognized faces as new persons and update stored face references for better future recognition.

These settings act as defaults and can be overridden in `vkcloud_vision.recognize_faces` service call`.

truncate_space.title: Clear Face Data
truncate_space.description: Remove all face data from a space. This action cannot be undone.

error.truncate_failed: Failed to clear space. Check Home Assistant logs and try again.

detect_objects.name: Detect Objects
detect_objects.description: Detect objects, scenes, or other features in images and optionally save processed images with bounding boxes.

modes.name: Detection Modes
modes.description: Select one or more detection modes to apply. Defaults to "multiobject" if not specified.

prob_threshold.name: Probability Threshold
prob_threshold.description: Minimum probability for detected objects to be included in results. Defaults to 0.1 (10%).

file_out.name: Output File Path
file_out.description: Template for path to save processed image with bounding boxes.

num_snapshots.name: Number of Snapshots
num_snapshots.description: Number of snapshots to capture from the camera. Defaults to 1.

bounding_boxes.name: Bounding boxes display style
bounding_boxes.description: Configure how detected objects should be visualized in the output image. Defaults to "rus" (Russian labels).

snapshot_interval_sec.name: Snapshot Interval
snapshot_interval_sec.description: Interval in seconds between capturing snapshots. Defaults to 0.5 seconds.

max_retries.name: Maximum Retries
max_retries.description: Number of retry attempts for API requests in case of timeouts or temporary errors. Defaults to 5.

detailed.name: Detailed Results
detailed.description: Return detailed recognition results with coordinates and confidence scores.

recognize_faces.name: Recognize Faces
recognize_faces.description: Identify persons in camera snapshots using face recognition. Use training mode in integration options to automatically enroll new faces.

space.name: Face Space
space.description: Numeric identifier (0–9) to isolate persons between different applications.

create_new.name: Create New
create_new.description: If enabled, unrecognized faces will be automatically added as new persons.

update_embedding.name: Update Embedding
update_embedding.description: Update the stored face reference for better future recognition. Disable for low-quality images.

reauth_required.message: Please re-authenticate using the service token. Issue details: {github_issue_url}.
